'''Coral Depths City''' was the oldest part of [[Coral City/Legends|Coral City]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]].

==History==
It was the birthplace of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

Along with [[Foamwander City]] and [[Reef Home City]], it was charged with coordinating orbital defense.

Many leaders and Senators fled there after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] captured [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

During the [[attack on Mon Calamari]], it came under assault by three [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' the city is described as a pressurized base on the seafloor.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] {{1st}}
